data.raceComments: {"comment":"11. UBER IN settled well back then came home powerfully to score over 1300m at Canberra last time out. In form and will take beating again. 14. ROYAL MEMORY hasn't been far away recently including last time out when third over 1200m at Queanbeyan. Has a win and five minor placings at this journey from seven starts and has solid claims. 2. DRAMA DODGER racing well. Followed a win at Wagga two starts ago with a second last start over 1100m at this track, beaten 1.4 lengths. Can feature. 5. BOOM IN THE DARK was ordinary last start when eighth over 1300m at this track. Finds a suitable race and is worth including in wider plays.","runners":[11,14,2,5],"exclusive":false}
